title: melissa acinoides
intro: Melissa acinoides, also known as the yellow melissa or lemon balm, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to East Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce anxiety, making it a popular natural remedy for insomnia, stress, and restlessness. The health benefits of Melissa acinoides include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Melissa acinoides is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and can be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve mood.
